title: 长方体切割·染色问题
question: 一个 5×4×3 的长方体木块，由 60 个棱长为 1 的小正方体组成。在其六个面上都涂上红色油漆，然后沿着小正方体的接缝将它全部切开。请问：恰好有两个面被涂成红色的小正方体有多少个？

figures.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 500 300' width='500' height='300'><defs>  <linearGradient id='topFace' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='100%'>    <stop offset='0%' style='stop-color:#e74c3c;stop-opacity:0.3'/>    <stop offset='100%' style='stop-color:#e74c3c;stop-opacity:0.5'/>  </linearGradient>  <linearGradient id='frontFace' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='100%'>    <stop offset='0%' style='stop-color:#3498db;stop-opacity:0.2'/>    <stop offset='100%' style='stop-color:#3498db;stop-opacity:0.4'/>  </linearGradient>  <linearGradient id='sideFace' x1='0%' y1='0%' x2='100%' y2='100%'>    <stop offset='0%' style='stop-color:#2ecc71;stop-opacity:0.2'/>    <stop offset='100%' style='stop-color:#2ecc71;stop-opacity:0.4'/>  </linearGradient></defs><!-- 长方体 5×4×3 等轴测投影 --><!-- 前面：宽5高3 --><polygon points='120,180 370,180 370,270 120,270' fill='url(#frontFace)' stroke='#2980b9' stroke-width='2'/><!-- 顶面：宽5深4 (斜投影) --><polygon points='120,180 370,180 420,130 170,130' fill='url(#topFace)' stroke='#c0392b' stroke-width='2'/><!-- 右侧面：深4高3 (斜投影) --><polygon points='370,180 420,130 420,220 370,270' fill='url(#sideFace)' stroke='#27ae60' stroke-width='2'/><!-- 网格线 - 前面 --><line x1='170' y1='180' x2='170' y2='270' stroke='#2980b9' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='220' y1='180' x2='220' y2='270' stroke='#2980b9' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='270' y1='180' x2='270' y2='270' stroke='#2980b9' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='320' y1='180' x2='320' y2='270' stroke='#2980b9' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='120' y1='210' x2='370' y2='210' stroke='#2980b9' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='120' y1='240' x2='370' y2='240' stroke='#2980b9' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><!-- 网格线 - 顶面 --><line x1='170' y1='180' x2='220' y2='130' stroke='#c0392b' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='220' y1='180' x2='270' y2='130' stroke='#c0392b' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='270' y1='180' x2='320' y2='130' stroke='#c0392b' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='320' y1='180' x2='370' y2='130' stroke='#c0392b' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='145' y1='155' x2='395' y2='155' stroke='#c0392b' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='120' y1='180' x2='170' y2='130' stroke='#c0392b' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><!-- 网格线 - 右侧面 --><line x1='370' y1='210' x2='420' y2='160' stroke='#27ae60' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><line x1='370' y1='240' x2='420' y2='190' stroke='#27ae60' stroke-width='0.5' opacity='0.5'/><!-- 尺寸标注 --><text x='245' y='295' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#2980b9' text-anchor='middle'>长 = 5</text><text x='430' y='175' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#27ae60' text-anchor='start'>宽 = 4</text><text x='105' y='225' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='14' fill='#c0392b' text-anchor='end'>高 = 3</text><!-- 说明 --><text x='250' y='30' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='16' fill='#333' text-anchor='middle' font-weight='bold'>5 × 4 × 3 长方体 (共60个小方块)</text><text x='250' y='55' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='13' fill='#666' text-anchor='middle'>所有表面涂上红色后，沿接缝切开</text></svg>
figures.caption: 5×4×3 的长方体，由 60 个棱长为 1 的小正方体组成
figures.alt: 一个5乘4乘3的长方体三维示意图，表面被分割成小正方体

solutions.label: 棱块计数法
steps: 两面涂色的小正方体，都位于原大长方体的棱上，但不在顶点处。
长方体有12条棱，分为3组：4条长棱（5）、4条中棱（4）、4条高棱（3）。
每条棱上的两面涂色方块数量 = 该棱上的小方块总数 - 2（减去两个顶点处的三面涂色方块）。

scenes.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 500 320' width='500' height='320'><!-- 长方体框架 --><polygon points='120,190 370,190 420,140 170,140' fill='none' stroke='#ccc' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><polygon points='120,190 370,190 370,280 120,280' fill='none' stroke='#ccc' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><polygon points='370,190 420,140 420,230 370,280' fill='none' stroke='#ccc' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><!-- 顶点标记 (三面涂色) --><circle cx='120' cy='190' r='5' fill='#f39c12' stroke='#e67e22' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='370' cy='190' r='5' fill='#f39c12' stroke='#e67e22' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='170' cy='140' r='5' fill='#f39c12' stroke='#e67e22' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='420' cy='140' r='5' fill='#f39c12' stroke='#e67e22' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='120' cy='280' r='5' fill='#f39c12' stroke='#e67e22' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='370' cy='280' r='5' fill='#f39c12' stroke='#e67e22' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='170' cy='90' r='5' fill='#f39c12' stroke='#e67e22' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='420' cy='230' r='5' fill='#f39c12' stroke='#e67e22' stroke-width='1.5'/><!-- 高亮长棱上的两面涂色方块 --><line x1='120' y1='190' x2='370' y2='190' stroke='#e74c3c' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' opacity='0.7'/><!-- 标注 --><text x='245' y='175' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='12' fill='#e74c3c' text-anchor='middle'>长棱：共4条</text><text x='245' y='310' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='13' fill='#333' text-anchor='middle'>每条长棱：5 - 2 = 3 个 (去掉两端黄点)</text><!-- 图例 --><rect x='30' y='20' width='12' height='12' fill='#f39c12' rx='2'/><text x='48' y='31' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#333'>三面涂色（顶点）</text><rect x='30' y='40' width='12' height='12' fill='#e74c3c' rx='2' opacity='0.7'/><text x='48' y='51' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='11' fill='#333'>两面涂色（棱中）</text></svg>
scenes.caption: 步骤1：识别长棱。每条长棱有 5 个小方块，去掉两端的三面涂色方块（黄点），剩下 3 个两面涂色方块。4条长棱共 4 × 3 = 12 个。

scenes.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 500 320' width='500' height='320'><!-- 长方体框架 --><polygon points='120,190 370,190 420,140 170,140' fill='none' stroke='#ccc' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><polygon points='120,190 370,190 370,280 120,280' fill='none' stroke='#ccc' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><polygon points='370,190 420,140 420,230 370,280' fill='none' stroke='#ccc' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><!-- 顶点 --><circle cx='120' cy='190' r='4' fill='#f39c12' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='370' cy='190' r='4' fill='#f39c12' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='170' cy='140' r='4' fill='#f39c12' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='420' cy='140' r='4' fill='#f39c12' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='120' cy='280' r='4' fill='#f39c12' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='370' cy='280' r='4' fill='#f39c12' opacity='0.5'/><!-- 高亮中棱 --><line x1='170' y1='140' x2='420' y2='140' stroke='#3498db' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' opacity='0.7'/><line x1='120' y1='280' x2='370' y2='280' stroke='#3498db' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' opacity='0.7'/><text x='295' y='125' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='12' fill='#3498db' text-anchor='middle'>中棱：共4条</text><text x='245' y='310' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='13' fill='#333' text-anchor='middle'>每条中棱：4 - 2 = 2 个，4条共 4 × 2 = 8 个</text></svg>
scenes.caption: 步骤2：中棱（宽方向的棱）。每条有 4 个小方块，去掉两端剩 2 个。4条中棱共 8 个。

scenes.svg: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 500 320' width='500' height='320'><!-- 长方体框架 --><polygon points='120,190 370,190 420,140 170,140' fill='none' stroke='#ccc' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><polygon points='120,190 370,190 370,280 120,280' fill='none' stroke='#ccc' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><polygon points='370,190 420,140 420,230 370,280' fill='none' stroke='#ccc' stroke-width='1' stroke-dasharray='4,4'/><!-- 顶点 --><circle cx='120' cy='190' r='4' fill='#f39c12' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='370' cy='190' r='4' fill='#f39c12' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='170' cy='140' r='4' fill='#f39c12' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='420' cy='140' r='4' fill='#f39c12' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='120' cy='280' r='4' fill='#f39c12' opacity='0.5'/><circle cx='370' cy='280' r='4' fill='#f39c12' opacity='0.5'/><!-- 高亮高棱 --><line x1='120' y1='190' x2='120' y2='280' stroke='#27ae60' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' opacity='0.7'/><line x1='370' y1='190' x2='370' y2='280' stroke='#27ae60' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' opacity='0.7'/><line x1='170' y1='140' x2='170' y2='90' stroke='#27ae60' stroke-width='6' stroke-linecap='round' opacity='0.7'/><text x='100' y='235' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='12' fill='#27ae60' text-anchor='end'>高棱：共4条</text><text x='245' y='310' font-family='sans-serif' font-size='13' fill='#333' text-anchor='middle'>每条高棱：3 - 2 = 1 个，4条共 4 × 1 = 4 个</text></svg>
scenes.caption: 步骤3：高棱。每条有 3 个小方块，去掉两端剩 1 个。4条高棱共 4 个。
两面涂色的小正方体总数 = 12 + 8 + 4 = 24 个

variant.question: 将一个 6×6×6 的正方体表面涂色后切成小方块。一面涂色、两面涂色、三面涂色的各有多少个？
variant.hint: 一面涂色在面中心，两面涂色在棱中，三面涂色在顶点。
